authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(62) — Illinois River and tributaries
sources.quotedText: (62) Illinois River and tributaries (Del Norte Co.). Closed to all fishing all year.

sources.title: The Illinois River Basin | Friends of the Kalmiopsis
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.note: The Illinois River and all of its tributaries within Del Norte County, California (the California headwater reaches within the Siskiyou Wilderness upstream of the Oregon state line), are closed to all angling year-round.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year
regulations.verbatimText: Illinois River and tributaries (Del Norte Co.). Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license. Note: this water is closed to all fishing year-round regardless of licensure.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+ (moot here since the water is closed to all fishing)
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
